title: Breaking One Block Breaks All The Blocks
description: If you break a block... it breaks every block in a 50 block radius.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oXHB7zvjv4A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

If you break one block, you break every block of the same type in a 50 block radius.

If this gets enough traction I'll add the ability to change the radius but I think 50 is a reasonable trade off between lag and the pure carnage.
